name: song-canvas-fit
note: Operator UAT 2026-07-18 (live v187), two layout findings on the Song canvas. (1) 'pre chorus causes wrap on 1 element breaking layout': the longest section label pushed the card's last control onto a second line - asserts ALL five controls share one row on EVERY standard-section card at a NARROW viewport (360px, where the wrap reproduces; flex line-breaking ignores shrinkability, so the label must be flex-basis:0). (2) 'missing solo section': the template-label switcher scrolled with no affordance, so Solo/Outro read as ABSENT - asserts the switcher does not overflow and every one of the 7 labels (Solo included) is fully inside its box. S-COMPOSE-CALM (2026-07-19): first capture enters via the Save sheet (grow/add); later captures ride the Build-the-chords hop; every capture clears the strip and lands on the canvas.

steps.label: capture as Pre-Chorus (the longest label - the wrap repro)
open the Song canvas via Save (draft-only path - its editor is one tap from Save)
F1: the Pre-Chorus card keeps ALL FIVE controls on ONE row (no wrapped X) and the card does not overflow
F2: the template-label switcher shows ALL 7 sections with Solo fully visible - nothing hidden behind a scroll
